---
title: "Mary Anne Yonge"
---

## Mary Anne Yonge

**Dates:** (1791-1853)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Known as 'Aunt Marianne', she was the sister of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
